Items.Title: 2023 年要避免的 5 个无服务器计算误解 | 5 Serverless Computing Misconceptions to avoid in 2023
Items.Description:
云泽尼克斯

发表于 4 月 12 日


软件开发生命周期是当今每个人生活的一部分，从开发人员到最终用户。 出于同样的原因，DevOps 和云计算解决方案提供商正在探索有关无服务器计算的声音。 随着无服务器计算的快速发展，很明显，不了解这项技术的人提供了一个错误的假设。

互联网上发表了几项研究，揭示了人们熟悉和过时的误解。 鉴于这些误解在发展领域颇为流行，它确实创造了与不存在的技术相关的神话。 然而，这些现有的神话表明无服务器计算是刚出炉的。

无服务器计算及其在现实世界中的应用在不断增长，有时，跟上它的步伐具有挑战性。 对于试图利用无服务器计算更好地满足企业需求的人们，本文适合他们。 让我们打破一些关于无服务器计算的迷思和误解。 了解更多： cloudzenix.com/5-serverless-computing-m…

原文:

CloudZenix

Posted on Apr 12


The Software Development Life Cycle is part of everyone’s life today, from developers to end users. For the same reason, DevOps and Cloud Computing solution providers are exploring the soundbites concerning serverless computing. As serverless computing is evolving rapidly, it’s evident that people unaware of the technology provide a misguided assumption.

DevOps and Cloud Computing are influencing the world of tech globally. Several studies have been published on the internet that shed light on familiar and outdated misconceptions. Given that these misconceptions are quite a buzz in the realm of development, it does create myths related to technologies that don’t exist. However, these existing myths suggest serverless computing is fresh out of the oven.

Serverless computing and its application in the real world are constantly growing, and at times, it’s challenging to keep up with it. For people who are trying to leverage serverless computing to serve the needs of businesses better, this article is for them. Let’s bust some myths and misconceptions about serverless computing. Learn more: cloudzenix.com/5-serverless-computing-m…

If cloudzenix is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
